title: New Baby Mobs Improvement
description: this resource pack improves the eyes of new baby mobs, from version 26.1
body: this resource pack is designed to fix new baby mobs from version 26.1, because many players find their eyes "ominous". this resourcepack refreshes the eyes of new baby mobs (cows, mooshroom, dogs, cats, pigs, sheep, mule, donkey, dolphin).this is for those who didn't like the new textures of the baby mobs. No additional resources are required to use this resource pack
